reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención a nivel general... No hay mucha opciones en Santa Clara por lo que en plena temporada se complica mucho la carga de combustible y la fila se hace larga. Está justo a la entrada viniendo desde la ruta 2 y a metros de la ruta 11 camino a Mar del Plata

(Translated by Google)
Very good service overall... There aren't many options in Santa Clara, so during peak season, getting fuel is very difficult and the line gets very long. It's right at the entrance coming from Route 2 and a few meters from Route 11 on the way to Mar del Plata.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRaGVqSXFnRRAB
